Luigi Desideri

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Copy after Giambattista Tiepolo’s fresco of the ‘Meeting of Antony and Cleopatra’ in the Ballroom Palazzo Labia, Venice (1746-1747), 1883.
by Luigi Desideri
Venice · 1883
Copy after Giambattista Tiepolo’s fresco of the ‘Banquet of Antony and Cleopatra’ in the Ballroom Palazzo Labia, Venice (1746-1747), 1883.
by Luigi Desideri
Venice · 1883
